# How decisive were these results, combined?


::: {.cell}

:::


**TL;DR:** Ice Cream Sandwich buried Popsicle (36–11, 77%), the most decisive result of this dessert round. Cinnamon, meanwhile, ended in a flat-out tie: Churro 23, Cinnamon Bun 23 — you can't get closer to a coin flip than that.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}


|question           |  N|Leader (votes)          |Trailer (votes)      |Leader share | Margin (votes)|Margin (points) | p vs 50/50|Leader 95% CI | Votes to flip|
|:------------------|--:|:-----------------------|:--------------------|:------------|--------------:|:---------------|----------:|:-------------|-------------:|
|Chilled and Molded | 43|Flan (30)               |Panna Cotta (13)     |69.8%        |             17|39.5%           |   0.013700|[0.54, 0.83]  |             9|
|Cinnamon           | 46|Churro (23)             |Cinnamon Bun (23)    |50.0%        |              0|0.0%            |   1.000000|[0.35, 0.65]  |             1|
|Cookie             | 42|Macaroon (23)           |Macaron (19)         |54.8%        |              4|9.5%            |   0.644000|[0.39, 0.70]  |             3|
|Summer Treat       | 47|Ice Cream Sandwich (36) |Popsicle (11)        |76.6%        |             25|53.2%           |   0.000346|[0.62, 0.88]  |            13|
|Tart/Torte         | 47|Fruit Tart (26)         |Chocolate Torte (21) |55.3%        |              5|10.6%           |   0.560000|[0.40, 0.70]  |             3|

# Does HQ agree with RTP?


::: {.cell}

:::



::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}


|question           |Leader (overall)   |HQ share    |RTP share   |Gap (pts) | p-value|
|:------------------|:------------------|:-----------|:-----------|:---------|-------:|
|Chilled and Molded |Flan               |76% (22/29) |57% (8/14)  |19%       |   0.369|
|Cinnamon           |Churro             |52% (16/31) |47% (7/15)  |5%        |   1.000|
|Cookie             |Macaroon           |61% (17/28) |43% (6/14)  |18%       |   0.443|
|Summer Treat       |Ice Cream Sandwich |74% (23/31) |81% (13/16) |7%        |   0.859|
|Tart/Torte         |Fruit Tart         |59% (19/32) |47% (7/15)  |13%       |   0.616|


:::
:::



::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![HQ vs RTP support for each question's overall winner.](index_files/figure-html/fig-hq-rtp-1.png){#fig-hq-rtp width=672}
:::
:::


The Alignment Index itself is unremarkable this week — **0.73**, basically flat versus last time, with the cumulative number at **0.81**. But look at the flip count instead of the correlation: 3 of this poll's 5 questions — Cinnamon, Cookie, Tart/Torte — saw HQ and RTP prefer genuinely different desserts. That's a majority of this week's questions, the most we've seen split by office in a single poll, and it brings the running tally to **7 flips** since RTP joined. Still nothing here clears statistical significance on its own (these are small offices, and small offices are noisy) — but a correlation coefficient can look perfectly fine while more than half the individual questions quietly disagree underneath it, which is exactly what's happening this week.
